title: Project Title
summary: One or two clear sentences about what this project is and why it exists.
complexityNotes: Optional short note about what makes the project simple, moderate, or complex.
currentState: Describe what currently exists, what is shipped, or what is still a prototype.

caseStudy.problem: What problem or itch made this worth building. Keep it factual and verifiable from the repo.
caseStudy.approach: How you tackled it: the key decisions, tools, and structure.
caseStudy.outcome: What now works as a result. No hype, no invented metrics.

highlights: Short, factual proof point a visitor can scan in one line.
Another concrete thing this project does well.
learned: One thing you took away from building this.
